query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_users_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS email_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'oauth' OR loginMethod IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS oauth_or_other_users
FROM users
WHERE DATE(lastSignedIn) = CURDATE();
